summary: Completed comprehensive testing of admin dashboard features for SkyView Drone Photography. All backend APIs are 100% functional. Frontend admin UI works perfectly with full CRUD operations for bookings, clients, and contacts.
passed_tests: Admin dashboard stats display (8 bookings, $0 revenue, 0 clients, 6 contacts)
Admin navigation between Overview, Bookings, Clients, Contacts pages
Booking management - view all bookings, filter by status
Client management - view client list and booking counts
Contact management - view contacts, filter by status
Photo upload endpoint authentication and validation
Email notification logging (MOCKED - logs to console)
JWT token authentication for all admin endpoints
All 31 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
